data.body: Done (per user direction to complete the epic now): removed the REBAR_NATIVE_READS kill-switch + subprocess read fallback; reads are unconditionally in-process. Parity test re-anchored on the bash dispatcher (rebar._engine.run) so the 26-case oracle survives. Commit a93885e. Note: removed within the 0.2.0 cycle rather than after a soak — accepted by user.
